mapper.select: SELECT song_id, title, artist, audio_file AS imageUrl, NULL AS progress FROM songs
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_rankings (user_id, song_id, rank, score, time_seconds) VALUES (#{userId}, #{songId}, #{rank}, #{score}, #{timeSeconds})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_rankings WHERE song_id = #{songId} ORDER BY score DESC, time_seconds ASC LIMIT 5
